info.name: Invexis Backend - Event-Driven Architecture
info.description: Complete API test collection for Auth, Company, and Shop Services

item.name: 7. Get All Company Users (from Auth Service)
10. Remove User from All Company Departments
1. Set Operating Hours for All Days
4. Check If Shop is Open Now
FLOW 1: Complete Company Setup
item.description:
1. Create Company (POST /companies) - Emits company.created
2. System auto-creates Sales & Management departments
3. Assign Company Admin (POST /company-admins/company/:id) - User becomes admin
4. Verify company created via GET /companies/:id

Expected: Company with 2 departments, Admin assigned

item.name: FLOW 2: Assign User to Department
item.description:
1. Assign user to Sales dept (POST /department-users) - Emits department_user.assigned
2. Event → Outbox → RabbitMQ → Auth Service
3. Auth Service updates user.assignedDepartments[]
4. User logs in - Auth Service checks departments

Verify: GET /department-users/user/:id shows user in Sales dept

item.name: FLOW 3: Shop Operating Hours Block Login
item.description:
1. Create Shop (POST /shop) - Emits shop.created
2. Set hours closed (PUT /shop/:id/operating-hours) - Emits shop.operating_hours.updated
3. Event → Outbox → RabbitMQ → Auth Service
4. Auth Service caches hours in Redis
5. Employee tries to login (POST /login)
6. Auth checks shop hours - BLOCKED (423 Locked)

Verify: Login returns 423 when shop closed

item.name: FLOW 4: Company Disabled Blocks Login
item.description:
1. Disable Company (PATCH /companies/:id/status) - Emits company.status.changed
2. Event → Outbox → RabbitMQ → Auth Service
3. Auth Service adds companyId to Redis disabled:companies
4. Employee tries to login (POST /login)
5. Auth checks disabled companies - BLOCKED (423 Locked)

Verify: Login returns 423 when company disabled

item.name: FLOW 5: Change User Role in Department
item.description:
1. User assigned as 'seller' in Sales dept
2. Change role to 'manager' (PATCH /department-users/.../role)
3. Emits department_user.role_changed event
4. Event → Outbox → RabbitMQ → Auth Service
5. Auth Service updates cache

Verify: GET /department-users/.../department/:id shows new role 'manager'
